title: Shulker+
description: Having trouble sorting your Shulker boxes? Looking for ways to better customize them so they stand out? We’re here to help.
body:
![Title](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_Header.webp)

NOTE: Shulker+ Exists for both Fabric and Forge, make sure to select the correct version for your loader.

Having trouble sorting your Shulker boxes? Looking for ways to better customize them so they stand out? We’re here to help.

Inspired by Xisuma’s datapacks, Shulker+ is a Minecraft mod that adds the ability to label Shulker boxes with an item dynamically rendered as an item frame on top, even in your inventory. With this mod, the box can also retain its custom name, as the recipe for labeling a shulker box is a shulker box and the item being combined at an anvil. This way you can tell before laying it down which shulker chest you’re handling, and can more easily sort your chests on the go. It also adds the ability to dye shulker boxes to further differentiate them visually. 

Server Hosting w/ BisectHosting
Shulker+ is a great mod to share with friends, and with our verified server hosting partner BisectHosting, you can easily set up a multiplayer server now to enjoy it on! Click the banner below and use the code VaultHunters for 25% off your first month.


![Promo](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_PromoCard.webp)
[BisectPromo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/p/vaulthunters 'BisecPromo')
 
![Features](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_FEATURES.webp)

Allows players to label shulker boxes with an item rendered as an item frame
Allows custom naming for shulker boxes via the anvil
Choose your style! Shulker Plus can render the item on the vanilla 3d version of the shulker box, or change the base texture to flat (inspired by Xisuma) and render it like that (see screenshots)
Allows dyeing shulker boxes via shift+right click with a dye (optional)

Note: You can disable the shulker dyeing feature on the server side.



![Screenshots](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_SCREENSHOTS.webp)


![1](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_DyeGIF.gif)

![2](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_DisplayGIF.gif)

![3](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_AnvilGIF.gif)

![4](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_ViewModesGIF.gif)


![HowTo](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_HOWTOINSTALL.webp)

Option 1 : Using CurseForge Addon Manager
Step 1 - On the CurseForge launcher, open details on your modpack of choice.
Step 2 - Click the ‘Add More Content’ (puzzle icon) button to search for mods.
Step 3 - Search ‘Shulker Plus’ and click Install.

Option 2 : Manually Install
Step 1 - Click the Download button on this page to get the JAR file.
Step 2 - Place the downloaded file in your modpacks /mods folder


![Social](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Shulker_Plus/BH_SP_SOCIALS.webp)

Created by Iskall85
